owner.title: Andvari Associates · added · LMN · 2023Q4
owner.summary: ng in 2023 was Constellation Software whose stock had a total return (share price and dividends) of 58.9%. Constellation’s spin-offs, Topicus.com and Lumine, also had stellar years. In just twelve months, Constellation acquired over 100 niche, vertical market software businesses.

bullets.title: Andvari Associates · added · LMN · 2023Q4
bullets.summary: ng in 2023 was Constellation Software whose stock had a total return (share price and dividends) of 58.9%. Constellation’s spin-offs, Topicus.com and Lumine, also had stellar years. In just twelve months, Constellation acquired over 100 niche, vertical market software businesses.
